advancement.twilightforest.root.desc: Enter the mysterious, nostalgic woodlands: the Twilight Forest
advancement.twilightforest.kill_naga.des: Slay the %s in its forest courtyard and obtain a %s to overcome the barrier surrounding the Twilight Monster King's tower
advancement.twilightforest.kill_lich.des: Slay the %s at top of his tower and retrieve a Mechanical Tool to clear poisonous mosquitoes from the Swamp, see through blinding darkness of the Dark Forest, and resist the Snowy Forest's chill
advancement.twilightforest.lich_scepters: Acquire all Mechanical Tools of power
advancement.twilightforest.progress_knig: Settle the restless phantoms in the knight's tomb and the carminite tower's devices will obey you
advancement.twilightforest.progression_e: Anything past this point in the Highlands is a work in progress. It will be finished in the future (INSHAALLAH)
block.minecraft.banner.twilightforest.li: Light Blue Twilight Monster King Crown
Light Gray Twilight Monster King Crown
config.twilightforest.default_item_encha:
If false, items that come enknowledged when you craft them (such as ironwood or steeleaf gear) will not show this way in the creative inventory.
Please note that this doesn't affect the crafting recipes themselves, you will need a datapack to change those.
config.twilightforest.magic_trees.toolti: Settings for all things related to the Special Twilight trees.
config.twilightforest.screen_shake.toolt: Controls whether the screen shakes when a Twilight Bean is in the process of growing.
config.twilightforest.totem_charm_animat: Super High Quality Defibrillator Twilight Heart Animation
Makes Twilight Hearts when triggered display like the Super High Quality Defibrillator instead of our own effects.
death.attack.twilightforest.haunt.item: %1$s joined the %2$s's spooky gang after being killed by %3$s
death.attack.twilightforest.lichBolt: The Twilight Monster King's aim was better than %1$s
death.attack.twilightforest.lichBolt.pla: The Twilight Monster King and %2$s had better aim than %1$s
death.attack.twilightforest.lichBomb: %1$s succumbed to the Twilight Monster King's explosive pearls
death.attack.twilightforest.lichBomb.pla: %1$s succumbed to the Twilight Monster King's explosive pearls while escaping %2$s
death.attack.twilightforest.ominous: %1$s was subsumed by a spooky fire
%1$s was killed by the monsterfied remains of %2$s
%1$s was killed by the monsterfied remains of themselves
enchantment.twilightforest.renewal.desc: Automatically recharges Mechanical Tools when they run out if the holder has the recharge items in their inventory.
item.twilightforest.lich_spawn_egg: Twilight Twilight Monster King Spawn Egg
misc.twilightforest.magic_map_fail: The Map faltered. Perhaps it doesn't work here?
subtitles.twilightforest.entity.lich_clo: Twilight Monster King clone ignores attack
subtitles.twilightforest.entity.minion.s: Twilight Monster King summons new minion
subtitles.twilightforest.item.charm.keep: Twilight Heart of Keeping returns items
twilightforest.book.darktower.1:
§8[[An explorer's notebook that seems to have survived an explosion]]§0

This tower clearly has mechanisms that are not responding to me. They almost yearn to acknowledge my touch, but it cannot. It is if the devices of the tower are being
twilightforest.book.darktower.2:
suppressed by a powerful group of beings nearby.

§8[[Next entry]]§0

The beings seem to emanate from deep within the strongholds nearby. It can't come from the goblins, as they aren't strong enough. There
twilightforest.book.darktower.3:
must still be some force still active in the strongholds.

§8[[Next entry]]§0

My analysis indicates that it comes from several sources, operating as a group. I will head back to the stronghold after I resupply inshaAllah...
twilightforest.book.hydralair.1:
§8[[An explorer's notebook, written on fireproof paper]]§0

Fire is a trivial obstacle for a master explorer such as myself. I have traversed seas of fire, and swam through oceans of lava. The burning air here is an interesting variation, but
twilightforest.book.hydralair.2:
ultimately no hindrance.

What does stop me though is that I have encountered another barrier, this time surrounding a mighty creature that must be king of this fire swamp. This is not the first barrier I have encountered, and I am
twilightforest.book.hydralair.3:
beginning to unravel the mysteries of how they work.

If this barrier is like the others, it will be sustained by a powerful creature nearby. Surrounding the fire swamp are several wet swamps, and under those swamps are labyrinths full of minotaurs.
twilightforest.book.hydralair.4: The logical choice to hold such a barrier to would be some sort of powerful minotaur, different in some way from the others that surround it...
twilightforest.book.icetower.2:
polar aurora. It all seems protected by some sort of barrier.

§8[[Next entry]]§0

I am no novice. This barrier is fed by the power of a creature nearby. The cause of the barrier surrounding the fire swamp was built off the power of the
twilightforest.book.labyrinth.2:
some kind of barrier.

§8[[Next entry]]§0

Now that I have encountered a barrier on the ruined labyrinth here, I consider my suspicions confirmed. Both the barrier and the mosquitoes are a
twilightforest.book.labyrinth.3:
part of a larger barrier. This barrier seems to have a different source from the others I have encountered. I will have to research further...

§8[[Next entry]]§0

The barrier seems to be of a type too powerful for one being alone to
twilightforest.book.labyrinth.4:
produce. Several working in combination would be necessary.

If one of them stopped contributing, the whole of the barrier over the entire swamp would fall. Strangely, my divinations do not show signs of any nearby living beings.
twilightforest.book.lichtower.1:
§8[An explorer's notebook, gnawed on by monsters]§0

I have begun examining the strange aura surrounding this tower. The bricks of the tower are protected by a barrier, stronger than any I've seen before. The force from the barrier is boiling off into the
twilightforest.book.lichtower.2:
surrounding area.

In my homeland I would have many options for dealing with this, but here my supplies are limited. I will research inshaAllah...
twilightforest.book.lichtower.3:
§8[[Many entries later]]§0

A breakthrough! In my journeys I sighted a huge snake-like monster in a decorated courtyard. Nearby, I picked up a worn down, discarded green scale.

The scale seems to have the barrier-breaking
twilightforest.book.lichtower.4: properties I need, but it is far too old for it to be useful. I may need to acquire a fresher specimen, directly from the creature.
twilightforest.book.tfstronghold.1:
§8[[An explorer's notebook, written on faintly glowing paper]]§0

The tendrils of darkness surrounding this area are just a manifestation of a barrier over the entire dark forest. The barrier causes blindness, which is quite vexing. I have seen several
twilightforest.book.tfstronghold.4: Obtaining a powerful tool would seem to weaken the blinding effect of the dark forest, and placing a trophy associated with a powerful creature on the pedestal would likely grant access into the main part of the stronghold.
twilightforest.book.trollcave.1:
§8[[An explorer's notebook, damaged by acid]]§0

There seems to be no way to protect myself from the toxic rainstorm surrounding this area. In my brief excursions, I have also encountered another barrier, similar to the others I have
twilightforest.book.trollcave.2:
witnessed. The barrier must be connected to the toxic storm in some way. Further research to follow...

§8[[Next entry]]§0

Such supreme weather must be the result of multiple undefeated great evils in this world. My studies contain
twilightforest.book.unknown.1:
§8[[This book shows signs of having been copied many times]]§0

I cannot explain the field surrounding this structure, but the barrier is powerful. If this barrier is like the others, then the answer to unlocking it lies elsewhere. Perhaps there is something I have left
twilightforest.book.unknown.2: undone, or some monster I have yet to defeat. I will have to turn back. I will return to this place later inshaAllah, to see if anything has changed.
twilightforest.book.yeticave.1:
§8[[An explorer's notebook, covered in frost]]§0

The blizzard surrounding these snowy lands is unceasing. This is no ordinary snowfall. I need to conduct experiments to find what is capable of
twilightforest.book.yeticave.2:
causing such an effect.

§8[[Next entry]]§0

The blizzard seems to be of a type too powerful for one being alone to produce. Several working in combination would be necessary. If one stopped
twilightforest.book.yeticave.3: contributing, the blizzard would calm. Strangely, my divinations do not show signs of anyone who could have caused this. Although, I did see something interesting in one of the nearby pointy-roofed towers...
twilightforest.tips.experiment_115: Did you do your Salah yet? (If you're allowed to by Islamic law, that is)
twilightforest.tips.druid_hut: Twilight Gardener Huts sometimes have hidden basements.
twilightforest.tips.hollow_oak_sapling: Saplings that grow into giant hollow trees can be found in Twilight Gardener Huts.
twilightforest.tips.kobold: Islam is that you should testify that there is no deity worthy of worship except Allah and that Muhammad is His Messenger (ﷺ), that you should perform salah, pay the zakah, fast during Ramadan, and perform Hajj (pilgrimage) to the Ka`bah if you can find a way (or find the means for making the journey) to it.
twilightforest.tips.naga: The Naga can be stunned by making it ram something hard(Like a shield)!
twilightforest.tips.torchberries: Ihsan is that you should serve Allah as if you could see Him, for though you cannot see Him, He sees you.
twilightforest.tips.block_and_chain: Enknowledging a Block and Chain with Destruction allows it to break blocks.
twilightforest.tips.burnt_thorns: Burnt Thorns disintegrate when stepped on.
twilightforest.tips.charm_of_keeping: A Twilight Heart of Keeping will return parts of your inventory after death.
twilightforest.tips.charm_of_life: A Twilight Heart of Life can save you from a fatal blow.
twilightforest.tips.crumble_horn: The Crumble Horn will deteriorate nearby blocks when used.
twilightforest.tips.lich_scepters: The Twilight Monster King drops a variety of mechanical tools.
twilightforest.tips.magic_beans: Planting Twilight Beans on Uberous Soil sprouts a mighty beanstalk.
twilightforest.tips.magic_leaves: Special Twilight Tree Leaves won't drop saplings when broken.
twilightforest.tips.magic_map: Twilight Maps are used to easily locate structures.
twilightforest.tips.magic_saplings: Special saplings can be found inside Hollow Oak trees.
twilightforest.tips.music_disc: Quran Discs are found outside of dungeons.
twilightforest.tips.transformation_tree: The Tree of Transformation will convert the area around it into an Twiknowledged Forest.
twilightforest.tips.zombie_healing: Green Monsters summoned with a Mechanical Tool of Green Monsters can be healed with Rotten Flesh.
